definitions.J: arbitrary section X_R -> V with R J = I
definitions.A: closed nonnegative form operator for Q restricted to N

exactIdentities: D_trace is independent of the section J.
D_trace>=0 on X_R iff Q>=0 on the completed form domain.
In finite sampled trace coordinates RU=W Sigma, D_sample=W Sigma^{-1}(C-Gamma^*Gamma)Sigma^{-1}W^*.

kernelDefinitionStatus.label: intrinsic trace-side Schur kernel definition
kernelDefinitionStatus.reason: For any section J of R, define D_trace(x,y)=Q(Jx,Jy)-<Gamma_J x,Gamma_J y>.

sectionIndependenceStatus.label: section independence
sectionIndependenceStatus.reason: If J'=J+h with h:X_R->N, then Gamma' = Gamma + A^(1/2)h and the terms in c'-Gamma'^*Gamma' cancel algebraically. The finite section-change check also closes below tolerance.

infimumFormulaStatus.label: constrained-energy infimum formula
infimumFormulaStatus.reason: Completing the square gives D_trace(x,x)=inf{Q(f): Rf=x} under the already imported Douglas range condition.

finiteTraceKernelStatus.label: finite repair-free Schur kernels positive
finiteTraceKernelStatus.reason: All imported finite probes have min eig(C-Gamma^*Gamma)>0, including the 12/9 stress point.

volterraGreenGramStatus.label: continuum Volterra/Green Gram positivity
volterraGreenGramStatus.reason: The exact intrinsic kernel has been derived, but no explicit continuum Volterra/Green feature map has yet been constructed.
volterraGreenGramStatus.blocker: Derive functions G_x(u) and a positive measure/operator dmu(u) such that D_trace(x,y)=integral G_x(u) G_y(u) dmu(u) in the transported X_R norm.

correctedConclusion: The exact continuum trace-side Schur kernel is now identified. The algebraic derivation and section invariance are closed. The positivity theorem remains the explicit Volterra/Green Gram factorization of this intrinsic kernel in the transported X_R norm.
nextProofTarget: Construct an explicit Green feature map for D_trace, probably by solving the Euler-Lagrange minimizer for inf{Q(f):Rf=x} and expressing the minimized energy as an integral of squares.
